docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID FLEISIG. FILED BY YOUNGER, BRESHA EDWARDS, ROSH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNGER, BRESHA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EDWARDS, ROSH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,050.00 FILED BY YOUNGER, BRESHA AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, ROSH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNGER, BRESHA AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, ROSH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES -0- SERVED AUG-27-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, ROSH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-11-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNGER, BRESHA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
